__comments.content:
### Renderers

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| table | HTML table |
| chart | Data visualization |

- related: [[#workspace]]

blocks_syntax:
Blocks support a scope parameter.

With workspace filter:
```table
sql: SELECT __id FROM objects
scope: workspace
```

Without filter:
```table
sql: SELECT __id FROM objects
scope: all
```
